title: Unity Serialized Shield
platform: VS Code & VS Marketplace | Open Source
tagline: 100% Autonomous AI-developed refactoring extension for Unity serialization integrity.
description: Architected and delivered a complete developer-tooling solution that dynamically applies the [FormerlySerializedAs] attribute to C# variables renamed within IDEs. This prevents broken serialized data in Unity assets during refactoring, reducing data loss by 100%. Developed entirely via autonomous AI agents under precise architectural guidance.
features: Dynamic AST parser detecting renamed private serialized fields in real-time.
Available on the VS Code and Visual Studio Marketplace for direct, one-click developer workspace integration.
No-compile AST structural analysis utilizing high-efficiency regex and syntactic mapping.
Ensures zero broken prefab references or data corruption in large-scale teams.

title: Tic Tac Toe Glow
tagline: Spearheading system modernization and UI revamp for a global mobile title hit.
description: Acting as a core engineer migrating legacy architectures into scalable, high-performance systems. Solved complex performance bottlenecks on mobile devices, implemented comprehensive game mechanics, and styled highly optimized render custom shaders.
features: Architectural Refactoring: Resolved bottlenecks by enforcing SOLID principles, increasing runtime efficiency.
Tooling & Workflow: Designed advanced Odin Custom Editors to streamline developer asset mapping.
Core Systems Engineering: End-to-end design of Quests, Daily Rewards, Inventory, Shop Systems, and secure IAP.
Adaptive UI Framework: Engineered a fully responsive layout supporting multiple target resolutions at 60 FPS.

title: 29 Classic: Offline Card Games
tagline: Key developer scaling offline multiplayer card architectures and player experiences.
description: Led core system development, engineered complex offline card AI structures, and created a highly responsive, polished graphic layout ensuring zero-lag synchronization.
features: Implemented advanced matchmaking AI heuristics and local game state calculators.
Designed a highly polished, responsive, and tactile gameplay UI layout.
Optimized data footprint and serialized files to ensure instant boot time.
Continuously deployed live gameplay tweaks based on user retention analytics.

title: Cameleon 3D ERP
tagline: Backbone developer of a 3D Metaverse ERP combining Virtual Reality and digital twins.
description: Developed and secured core systems for high-fidelity industrial VR simulators. Linked operational SCADA and IoT real-time databases into simulated virtual metaverse environments.
features: Engineered real-time render streaming of VR assets straight to web interfaces.
Built multi-user spatial communications utilizing WebRTC and custom Node.js signaling.
Deployed secure, encrypted Universal Database readers via Node.js WebSocket servers.
Maintained scalable simulator infrastructure hosted on Amazon Web Services EC2.

title: Dragon Village
tagline: Leading clicker simulation with 5 Million downloads worldwide.
description: Engineered core progression layers, crossbreeding multiplier mathematics, and integrated high-conversion marketing modules to drive global user acquisition.
features: Structured progression states supporting over 100 elemental dragon classes.
Optimized clicker resource calculations, eliminating double-precision floating math errors.
Integrated secure ad suites and remote configurations (Unity Ads, Firebase).
Created highly converting visual interactive marketing assets via Luna SDK.

title: Jurassic Sniper 3D
tagline: Gameplay enhancer and UA marketing ad developer for high-traffic iOS titles.
description: Engineered responsive 3D weapon physics, customized visual feedback, and developed playable ad environments on Apple App Store.
features: Refined 3D projectile calculations and raycasting layouts for rapid action gameplay.
Designed a highly polished, sleek mobile visual feedback system (UI/UX).
Utilized Luna SDK to bridge C# code with lightweight web-friendly playable ads.
Drove significant organic user acquisition with responsive web assets.

title: Jurassic Sea Attack
tagline: Core framework engineer and high-performance playable ad developer.
description: Enhanced existing core physics layers, integrated polished visual feedback UI frameworks, and engineered high-retention playable marketing ads.
features: Enhanced standard physics equations to manage multiple aquatic entities seamlessly.
Designed a highly polished, tactile, and responsive user feedback layout.
Developed high-performance interactive ads translating sniper physics to web engines.
Optimized client-side packages to reduce download size constraints on low-end units.

title: Edit Me (Text Editor)
tagline: Lightweight, highly customizable Java-based rich text editor.
description: Created a lightweight text editing interface featuring an integrated file directory navigator. Includes color styling sheets, multiple theme packs, font scaling systems, and custom UTF-8 encoding support.
features: Built-in file explorer tree parsing directory locations seamlessly.
Seven preconfigured graphical interface skins (Light, Dark, Slate, and Custom).
Dynamic background, selection, and character color palettes.
Search-and-replace algorithm and HTML/CSS syntax formatter plugins.
